_comment: Mapping of model_name → download instructions. Populate the URLs once weights are hosted (e.g. HuggingFace, Zenodo, GCS). Each model's directory will be created under ~/.oncosplice/weights/<model_name>/. If `auto_unzip` is true (default) and the file is a .zip, it will be extracted in place.

openspliceai.description: OpenSpliceAI (PyTorch port of SpliceAI) — 5-model ensemble, 10000nt MANE-trained weights. Default for the OpenSpliceAI predictor.

spliceai_pytorch.description: SpliceAI weights translated Keras→PyTorch, loaded into the OpenSpliceAI architecture. Use this when you need numerical equivalence with the original Keras SpliceAI rather than OpenSpliceAI's separately-trained MANE weights.

spliceai_keras.description: SpliceAI original Keras/TF weights (Jaganathan et al. 2019) — 5-model ensemble.

pangolin.description: Pangolin — 40 PyTorch models (8 indices × 5 ensemble members), multi-tissue GTEx-trained.

spliceformer.description: Spliceformer — 40k-context transformer ensemble (Jónsson et al. Comms Bio 2024).
